task.title: Copying Documents or Photos
task.shortdesc: You can copy documents or photos onto various sizes and types of paper, including MetR

context.p: You can copy documents or photos onto various sizes and types of paper, including MetR special papers.

step.cmd: Load the paper you want to print on in the product.
Place your original document or photo on the scanner glass.
Press the home button, if necessary.
Press the left or right arrow button to select Copyand press the OKbutton. You see this screen:
To print more than one copy, press the up or down arrow button to select the number (up to 99).
Press the left or right arrow button to select one of the following:
Press the OKbutton to view the print settings for the copies. You see a screen like this:
Press the down arrow button to view the individual settings. You see this screen:
To change the print settings, press the left or right arrow button and select the necessary settings. When you are finished, press the OKbutton.
When you are ready to copy, press the start button.

result.note: To cancel copying, press the stop button.
